title: catalpa silvestrii
intro: Catalpa silvestrii, also known as the Chinese catalpa or Qin Fa, is a deciduous tree native to China and is a member of the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Catalpa silvestrii include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Catalpa silvestrii can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
